creator: matt@zigg.com
text:
hier(7) manpage description of /usr/libdata does not mention
/usr/libdata/perl.

Fix: Patch follows:



--LAA06192.928594817/torgo.zigg.local--
ReSent-Date: Sat, 5 Jun 1999 11:04:12 -0400 (EDT)
ReSent-From: Matt Behrens <matt@zigg.com>
ReSent-To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
ReSent-Subject: hier(7) is missing entry for /usr/libdata/perl
ReSent-Message-ID: <Pine.BSF.4.10.9906051104120.26134@megaweapon.zigg.com>--8DKfcNALKHCcp6DEnro4zc3gIDwHqf6pYDbM5mM7M4fw4GJF
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- hier.7	Wed Feb 17 19:58:20 1999
+++ hier.7+perl	Sat Jun  5 10:55:51 1999
@@ -252,6 +252,9 @@
 various prebuilt lint libraries;
 see 
 .Xr lint 1
+.It Li perl/
+perl modules; see
+.Xr perlmodlib 1
 .It Li stallion/
 holding the download firmware images
 .It Li tcl
How-To-Repeat: 
man 7 hier
